overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat exploring a foggy marsh settlement at night. The character walks through shallow water past wooden shacks, enters a tent with a campfire, and exits past sitting NPCs back into the open marsh.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy marsh approach to wooden settlement

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow marsh water towards a wooden shack in the fog

entered.detail: dark wooden shack with pointed roof emerging from the fog
large leafless twisted tree with bare branches
weathered wooden fence posts along the marsh path
shallow murky water covering the ground with grass tufts

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy marsh with shallow water, approaching a wooden settlement. A large dead tree stands to the right while a wooden shack emerges from the mist ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: path along wooden fence leading to central tent

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path beside a wooden fence towards a large tent

entered.detail: large canvas tent with open entrance and warm light inside
orange flickering light visible through the tent entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a narrow path bordered by a wooden fence on the right, approaching a large tent with a glowing campfire inside. The main shack falls behind as the tent becomes the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of large tent with campfire

events.description: character enters the tent from the foggy marsh outside
character turns to face tent entrance, revealing the contrast between warm interior and foggy exterior

agents.ego_description: entering the tent and looking around the interior before turning to face the entrance

entered.detail: canvas walls supported by wooden poles with woven texture
stacked wooden boxes and supplies along the tent wall
burning fire pit providing warm orange illumination
arched wooden frame of the tent doorway looking out to marsh

segments.scene_description: The character steps inside the tent, transitioning from the cold fog to a warm firelit interior. Wooden crates line the walls as the character turns to look back at the entrance, framing the foggy marsh outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh beyond settlement with scattered NPCs

events.description: character exits the tent back into the foggy marsh environment
passing by NPCs sitting on the ground near the path

agents.ego_description: exiting the tent and walking past sitting villagers into the open marsh

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the ground near a small campfire
second villager sitting further along the marsh path

entered.detail: rolling grassy hills fading into the foggy distance
small campfire with sitting figures beside the path
rocks and debris along the marsh path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the tent back into the fog, passing by villagers sitting near campfires. The settlement gives way to open marshland with rolling hills visible through the mist as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cold, foggy marsh that transitions into a warm settlement interior before returning to the open wilderness. It begins with the character wading through shallow water and mist, passing a large dead tree as a wooden shack emerges from the haze. As the character moves along a narrow fenced path, the scene shifts focus from the shack toward a large tent illuminated by a glowing campfire. The camera then follows the character inside the tent, where the cold gray fog is replaced by a warm, firelit interior lined with wooden crates, before turning back toward the entrance. Finally, the character exits the tent and passes sitting villagers by their fires, moving away from the settlement as the landscape opens back into a misty marshland with distant rolling hills.
